statement: In every magma, Equation 569 (`x = y * (z * (y * (w * w)))`) implies Equation 2354 (`x = (y * (y * (z * y))) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0648
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op y (op w w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z y))) w)
